detail: hand cards tilt strength now configurable via `hoverWarpAmount` prop (multiplier on `BALATRO_HOVER_WARP_AMOUNT`). Hand.tsx sets `HAND_CARD_HOVER_WARP_AMOUNT = 0.35` — tweak that constant to taste. Changes in worktree `hand-tilt-strength` (branch `worktree-hand-tilt-strength`).

output.result: hand cards tilt strength now configurable via `hoverWarpAmount` prop (multiplier on `BALATRO_HOVER_WARP_AMOUNT`). Hand.tsx sets `HAND_CARD_HOVER_WARP_AMOUNT = 0.35` — tweak that constant to taste. Changes in worktree `hand-tilt-strength` (branch `worktree-hand-tilt-strength`).

intent: i want the hand cards to tilt less, in other word i want to be able to modify tilt stenght on those specific cards
